channel.title: server on Lucas Chen's Archie
channel.description: Recent content in server on Lucas Chen's Archie

item.title: Redis 集群(Redis Cluster)
item.description: 简述如何使用 docker-compose 搭建 3 主 3 从的 Redis 集群。

item.title: Nginx 基础(Nginx Basic)
item.description:
How to use nginx easily.

The following sections are included:

  1. Install
  2. Configuration
  3. Virtual host
  4. Reverse proxy
  5. Load balancing
  6. Dynamic-Static Separation
  7. UrlRewrite
